---
id: list-available-features
title: "List available features"
description: "Lists the available features enabled for the authenticated user in a personal workspace context or an organization workspace context."
sidebar_label: "List available features"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"

  children={"List available features"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/permissions/features"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Lists the available features enabled for the authenticated user in a personal workspace context or an organization workspace context.
